```{=html}
<div class="deadline-box">
  Public comments are due <strong>July 13, 2026</strong> —
  <span class="dday" id="omb-dday">…</span> left.
  Comment at <a href="https://www.regulations.gov/docket/OMB-2026-0034" target="_blank" rel="noopener">regulations.gov</a>
  (Docket <strong>OMB-2026-0034</strong>).
</div>
<script>
  (function () {
    var deadline = new Date("2026-07-13T23:59:59-04:00");
    var el = document.getElementById("omb-dday");
    if (!el) return;
    var now = new Date();
    var days = Math.ceil((deadline - now) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
    if (days > 1)       el.textContent = days + " days";
    else if (days === 1) el.textContent = "1 day";
    else if (days === 0) el.textContent = "today is the last day";
    else { el.textContent = "the comment period has closed"; }
  })();
</script>
```
